response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below our share threshold (0.60), and we are in conservative mode preserving our own declining reserves for load continuity; cannot spare 0.5 kWh without risking islanded operation stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded operation with SoC declining below safe threshold; recent outbound sharing has accelerated depletion. Switching to conservative mode to preserve load continuity. Will resume balanced sharing only after SoC recovers above 0.60..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
